jd_text: Role: Head of Supply Chain Industry: Construction / Contracting Location: Dubai Salary: 45,000 AED + Education Allowance + Bonus Key Responsibilities: Procurement Management Multiple Warehouse Management Inventory Management Supply Chain Strategies Key Requirements: Must have managed Construction Material worth AED 200 - 500 Million. Must have managed upward of minimum 5 Warehouses simultaneously. Must have managed annual procurement of AED 500 Million. Prefer Mechanical Engineer, either Mechanical or Electrical studies. Must possess overall 20 years of work experience with last 10 years on a Head, Director or Senior Manager Procurement / Supply Chain level. Must come from Construction / Contracting background. Possess strong relationships with Glocal Manufacturers, Local Vendors and Subcontractors. Must be exposed to automating supply chain functions to run it efficiently.
